## Change

Describe the code or knowledge change and why it belongs in the project.

## Evidence

List sources and identify whether the wording is original, public domain, or
covered by an explicit compatible license.

## Checks

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Release checks pass.
- [ ] No student or family data is included.
- [ ] No textbook prose, exercises, answers, illustrations, or scans are included.
- [ ] New knowledge has stable IDs, source references, and grade reasoning.
